creator: man130117@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to:
  comment 20 (Greg V) : "...uninstall the mesa-libs package first...",
  comment 21 (Adriaan de Groot) : "...uninstall previous relevant things...",
  comment 22 (Jan Beich) : "...all direct consumers of mesa-libs must be rebuilt...")

Thank you all for the advice.

Usually I "pkg delete" problematic package without reporting a problem and waiting for an advice. However, in case of mesa-libs, this requires rebuilding (roughly) half of my system and it's hard to believe that I have to do it just for a new, fancy library (while the old one is quite good)? Is it really the only way?
